sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32451" key="e)kmelai/nomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκμελαίνομαι</orth>, <sense id="n32451.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be darkened, grow dark,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπὸ</foreign> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νυκτός</foreign>] ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
